subcodes.first_line: The esteemed Anín and Hanín of heart and tongue, enkindled with the fire of the love of God, reached the Most Holy Court in the Supreme Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب انین و حنین قلب و لسان آن مشتعل بنار محبت الله بساحت اقدس در افق اعلی و
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @predictions and prophecies, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
